BEGIN
DECLARE @TempTable TABLE (TimeStamp BIGINT, Date DateTime)
DECLARE @now DateTime = getutcdate();

DELETE FROM [TimeStampDateMapping] 
OUTPUT Deleted.TimeStamp, Deleted.Date INTO @TempTable
WHERE datediff(dd, Date, @now) >= @deletedChangeTrackingExpiryInDays;

SELECT TOP 1 * FROM @TempTable order by Date desc
END
